calendar.matters:
Petn. For Order Declaring Trust Invalid
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Teresa Main appearing for and with petitioner Larry Fabian. Louis Giannini appearing for and with executor Rudy Valeros. Settlement reached after mediation. Ms. Main is asking the Court to approve the settlement agreement. Court wants all the children to approve the settlement. Court will hold the order until receipt of the children's approval. Matter was referred to mediation in the estate, case number 287068. Order will be in that case number. Status on the estate set on 4/11 can be taken off calendar after the Court signs the order approving settlement agreement. This petition for order declaring trust invalid is off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Dave Davenport CSR# 1694. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Loos.

Petn. For Order Declaring Trust Invalid
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Mar-27-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
